# PromptGuard rules over ICAP (synthetic v1 fixture).
#
# Real ICAP integrations (Symantec, Forcepoint, Trellix) return
# vendor-specific rules over the OPTIONS / RESPMOD path; the body
# format below is a simplified PromptGuard-flavored variant
# documented at docs/adapters.md. v1.1 lands real wire compatibility.
#
# Format: one rule per line, fields tab-separated:
#   <category>\t<action>\t<min_confidence>

private_key	BLOCK	0.95
cloud_api_key	BLOCK	0.90
database_url	BLOCK	0.97
jwt	BLOCK	0.95
secret	BLOCK	0.90
internal_ip	TOKENIZE	0.99
domain	MASK	0.70
email	MASK	0.85
private_name	MASK	0.80
